name: Cagney Carnation 🔥
description:
꧁༺ It took me by surprise...༻꧂

Art credits: asimplechaos (formely known as ask-cagneycarnation)

Based on an actual ask tumblr blog before it was vanished. What made this version of Cagney so memorable was how artist set his petals on FIRE in his 3rd form. The blog isn't archived so I had to come up with some info on my own.

I generally hope this is okay for everyone on this app, especially the ones who remember the cagney blog. ❤️
creator: TheStupidSimps
